title: Fei Rari - REKT 2
relevance_summary: Reentrancy attack exploiting flash loans and Compound code vulnerabilities

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls exitMarket() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS exitMarket() AFTER A FLASH LOAN BORROW IN THE SAME TX
summary: The attacker exploited a reentrancy vulnerability in the Rari Fuse pools by using flash loans to repeatedly withdraw collateral without updating the borrow records. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing exitMarket() calls immediately following flash loan borrows.
